title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Nucleus Software

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Nucleus Software
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nucleus Software. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About Nucleus Software:
Nucleus Software is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software!
